description: baseline: faithful Python port of createChatClient() from A1-AI-Core@src/chat.js. 3 operations (callModel, callVision, callStructured), 4 error codes (AI_NOT_CONFIGURED, OPENROUTER_ERROR, AI_BAD_JSON, plus echo of upstream error.code). 12 test cases x 10 fields (ok, text, model, responseId, provider, error_code, error_status, last_request.method, last_request.body, last_request.headers) all pass on first run. First LLM-shaped example in the suite — proves the autoresearch loop works for transport-layer workflows, not just pure-function validators. Mock safeFetch from eval_set drives deterministic runs.
